biography: Jarkko, affectionately known as "Bailando" among his peers, is a familiar face at the Hector Trophée, representing Hirsala Golf with distinction. With a playing style as measured as his temperament is fiery, Jarkko brings a unique blend of skill and passion to the course.

A formidable competitor in both individual and team formats, Jarkko has distinguished himself as one of the greats to grace the fairways of the Hector Trophée. He has played in 9 previous tournaments, securing one coveted Hector Trophée title and one Victor Trophy for best individual player. His decade of experience will culminate in his tenth appearance in the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026.

Known for his meticulous approach to the game, Jarkko leaves no stone unturned in his quest for excellence. His preparation is as thorough as his commitment to his partner is unwavering, making him a force to be reckoned with in every match. As Hector Trophée 2026 approaches, all eyes will be on Jarkko as he seeks to add to his impressive resume.
